attempts.insight: THE genuinely-new ingredient for lem:pullback_unit_iso. CRITICAL recipe: SheafOfModules R compositions appear in defeq-but-not-syntactic forms (Scheme.Modules.pullback f vs SheafOfModules.pullback f.toRingCatSheafHom), so plain rw silently fails to unify -> use erw for every assoc/functoriality/hinner/hcomp' rewrite; bridge homEquiv_unit HO-match with explicit e := Adjunction.homEquiv_unit (adj:=) (X:=) (Y:=) (f:=) then e.symm.trans, never rw [← homEquiv_unit]. Axiom-clean {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}.

Every rewrite mechanism (rw [nat1], reassoc_of%, simp only [..._inv_naturality_assoc], slice_lhs, conv_lhs, set X) FAILS to unify the restrictScalarsComp'App .inv subterm against nat1's LHS despite printing identically and nat1 typechecking — likely representational/universe-level discrepancy between the App baked into gammaPushforwardIsoAt (built in a by-block with sets) and a freshly-applied restrictScalarsComp'App.
